extensionDescription: [BOJ-Extension] Algorithm tag hider & Random Defense, Totamjung!

nav.guideConfirmMessage: Open the Totamjung user guide page?

hider.warnAtHighTierSuffix: or higher will trigger a warning
hider.revealOnHoverLegend: Reveal difficulty when hovering over the tier icon
hider.algorithmHiderUsageLegend: How to reveal whether a problem is solvable using only known algorithms

dataManage.title: Data Management
dataManage.description1: If you want to back up your current settings or move your data to another device, you can export the settings as a save file or upload one.
dataManage.description2Prefix: The Totamjung save file extension is
dataManage.extractModalMessage: Export current settings to a save file. Click [Confirm] to proceed.
dataManage.resetWarningIntro: Please read the warnings below before resetting:
dataManage.resetWarning1: Resetting will erase all data, including critical data such as Quick Slot queries and history records.
dataManage.resetWarning2: Reset cannot be undone. If you want to preserve important data, we recommend first using "Export Settings" to back up your data.
dataManage.resetWarning3: The settings page will reload automatically after reset.
dataManage.resetInstructionPrefix: If you understand the warnings above and want to proceed with the reset, please type
dataManage.uploadWarningIntro: Please read the warnings below before uploading:
dataManage.uploadWarning1: Uploading will overwrite your existing data. That is, your existing data will be lost.
dataManage.uploadWarning2: Upload cannot be undone. If you want to preserve existing data, we recommend first using "Export Settings" to back up your data.
dataManage.uploadWarning3: The settings page will reload automatically after upload.
dataManage.uploadInstructionPrefix: If you understand the warnings above and want to proceed with the upload, please type

totamjungInfo.complainMessage: Could you please stop poking me!?
totamjungInfo.intro1: "Check whether a problem is solvable using only algorithms you know, without revealing the algorithm tags"
totamjungInfo.intro2: "Use a timer to lock algorithm tags for a set duration so they cannot be revealed"
totamjungInfo.intro3: "Save frequently used solved.ac search queries in slots, and run Random Defense with a single hotkey from within BOJ"
totamjungInfo.intro5: "Apply a variety of fonts to the problem body to suit your taste"
totamjungInfo.intro6: "Use solved.ac's high-difficulty warning on BOJ as well"

algorithmPool.noResultDescription: Please check your search keyword for typos.

tierSelect.selectTierAriaLabel: Set $1 as the warning threshold tier

widget.topButtonAriaLabel: Totamjung widget. Click to scroll to the top of the page, or right-click to open the widget.

inspect.check: This problem can be solved using only algorithms you know.
inspect.question: Solving this problem may require algorithms you don't know.

cardBox.openAriaLabel: Open the card box and run the draw

quickSlots.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete the draw saved in slot $1?

edit.advancedSearchSuffix: page to learn how to write solved.ac search queries!
edit.proPlanNotice: Draws are performed while signed out, so solved.ac Pro-only queries are not available.

randomDefenseCreate.advancedSearchSuffix: page to learn how to write solved.ac search queries!
randomDefenseCreate.proPlanNotice: Draws are performed while signed out, so solved.ac Pro-only queries are not available.

miniAlgorithm.addAriaLabel: Add $1 to the search algorithm list
miniAlgorithm.removeAriaLabel: Remove $1 from the search algorithm list

tierSlider.startAriaLabel: Set start tier of the range
tierSlider.endAriaLabel: Set end tier of the range

tierPreset.bronzeAriaLabel: Set range from Bronze V to Bronze I
tierPreset.silverAriaLabel: Set range from Silver V to Silver I
tierPreset.goldAriaLabel: Set range from Gold V to Gold I
tierPreset.platinumAriaLabel: Set range from Platinum V to Platinum I
tierPreset.diamondAriaLabel: Set range from Diamond V to Diamond I
tierPreset.rubyAriaLabel: Set range from Ruby V to Ruby I

searchOperator.orDescription: OR: Only problems containing at least one of the selected algorithm tags appear in the draw.
searchOperator.andDescription: AND: Only problems containing all of the selected algorithm tags appear in the draw.
searchOperator.norDescription: NOR: Only problems containing none of the selected algorithm tags appear in the draw.

randomDefenseHistory.indicatorDefaultMessage:
$1 problem(s) currently saved in history; maximum is $2.
When the limit is exceeded, the oldest entries are removed first.
randomDefenseHistory.indicatorWarning: The number of saved problems is approaching the limit. Make some space to avoid losing entries you want to keep.
randomDefenseHistory.indicatorFull: The maximum number of saved problems has been reached. New draws will remove the oldest entries. Make some space to avoid losing entries you want to keep.
randomDefenseHistory.emptyDescription: Once you run a draw, your history will appear here.

randomDefenseGacha.cardClickHint: Click the card box to see the result

gachaProblemCount.promptMessage: Enter the number of problems to draw.
gachaProblemCount.hotkeyTip: TIP: You can also start a Draw Now from within BOJ by long-pressing the hotkey for the corresponding slot number.

gacha.apiDataMismatch: Data mismatch detected in the data loaded from the API.
gacha.contactDeveloper: Please notify the developer that this issue occurred.
gacha.settingsDataMismatch: Data mismatch detected in the settings data.
gacha.savedToHistory: Problem list saved to draw history!

randomDefense.emptySlotDescription1: If you haven't created a draw yet, create one in that slot from the settings page first!
randomDefense.emptySlotDescription2: You can change which slot the widget click uses by changing the selected slot number in the Quick Slots menu in settings.
randomDefense.dataMismatchDescription: Please notify the developer that this issue occurred.

widget.inspectQuestionTitle: Solving this problem may require algorithms you don't know.
widget.inspectCheckTitle: This problem can be solved using only algorithms you know.

dataUpload.errorExtensionMessage: Save file must have the ".ttj" extension.
dataUpload.errorSizeMessage: Save file must be 1MiB or smaller.
dataUpload.errorUnknownVersionMessage: Cannot determine the version of this save file. If you believe this is a bug, please contact the developer.
dataUpload.errorTooHighVersionMessage: This save file's version is $1, which is higher than the maximum data version (5) this build can handle, or is unrecognized.
dataUpload.errorV2CorruptedMessage: v1.2.* save files are supported for upload, but this save file appears to have some or all data missing. If you believe this is a bug, please contact the developer.
dataUpload.errorV3CorruptedMessage: v1.3 ~ v1.3.3.2 save files are supported for upload, but this save file appears to have some or all data missing. If you believe this is a bug, please contact the developer.
dataUpload.errorV4CorruptedMessage: v1.3.4 save files are supported for upload, but this save file appears to have some or all data missing. If you believe this is a bug, please contact the developer.
dataUpload.errorCorruptedMessage: This save file appears to have some or all data missing. If you believe this is a bug, please contact the developer.
dataUpload.errorInvalidDataMessage: Data format is invalid. This can happen when a non-Totamjung file's extension is renamed to ".ttj". Could you double-check the save file?
